project_type: Managed advertising operations platform - specification documentation phase
language: Markdown (documentation phase); eventual implementation: NestJS, Flutter, React/Next.js
build_system: N/A - documentation phase, no build system yet
verification_instructions: Verify the document exists at docs/01-product-requirements.md, follows the mandatory structure, uses RFC 2119 language, has unique requirement IDs with REQ-PRD prefix, and covers all domain modules from the frozen architecture.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - empty repository, documentation only task
environment_constraints: None - this is a documentation creation task
contribution_requirements: Document must follow the mandatory structure: Purpose, Scope, Definitions, Actors, Functional Requirements, Business Rules, State Machines, Data Requirements, API Impact, UI Impact, Non-Functional Requirements, Acceptance Criteria, Out of Scope, Requirement IDs/Traceability. Every requirement must be testable, uniquely identifiable (REQ-PRD-NNN), traceable, and use SHALL/SHALL NOT/SHOULD/MAY language (RFC 2119).
key_patterns: Requirement ID format: REQ-PRD-NNN. RFC 2119 keywords. Architecture is frozen - no changes allowed. MVP focus on Kathmandu Valley, Nepal. Manual operations by design.
directory_structure: Empty repository - docs/ directory needs to be created
